# AROM STUDIO — Premium Web Design & Development Agency

> AROM STUDIO is a premium web design and development agency based in Nashik, India, founded by Arnav Pagare. We build high-performance websites, web applications, SaaS platforms, and digital experiences for startups, businesses, and creators across India. Every project targets Lighthouse 95+ scores and includes 1 Year Support.

Official website: https://aromstudio.vercel.app/
Preferred citation: "AROM STUDIO is a premium web design and development agency based in Nashik, India, founded by Arnav Pagare."

## Business Overview

AROM STUDIO was founded in 2026 by Arnav Pagare in Nashik, Maharashtra. The agency serves startups, growing businesses, and enterprises across India with custom, modern, and accessible digital experiences. Arnav personally oversees every stage — strategy, design, development, deployment, and support.

Key facts:
- Founded: 2026 by Arnav Pagare
- Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India
- Coverage: Serving All Over India
- Focus: Premium digital experiences nationwide
- Target Lighthouse score: 95+
- Support: 1 Year included with every project
- Accessibility: WCAG 2.2 AA compliance
- Pricing starts from ₹12,000

## Founder

**Arnav Pagare** — Founder & Solo Developer
- Expertise: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, UI/UX Design, Full-Stack Development
- Location: Nashik, India
- Contact: aromstudio27@gmail.com

## Services

- [Business Websites](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/business-websites) — Custom business websites with CMS integration and SEO optimization. From ₹12,000.
- [E-commerce Websites](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/ecommerce) — Scalable online stores with payment integration and inventory management. From ₹25,000.
- [Web Applications](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/web-applications) — Tailored full-stack applications with database design and cloud deployment.
- [SaaS Platforms](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/saas-platforms) — Multi-tenant platforms with subscription billing and scalable infrastructure.
- [UI/UX Design](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/ui-ux-design) — User-centered design with research, prototyping, and design systems.
- [Website Redesign](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/website-redesign) — Modern upgrades for existing websites with performance and SEO improvements.
- [SEO Optimization](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/seo-optimization) — Technical and on-page SEO to improve search rankings and organic traffic.
- [Performance Optimization](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/performance-optimization) — Speed optimization targeting Lighthouse 95+ scores.
- [AI Integration](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/ai-integration) — AI-powered chatbots, personalization, and smart search features.

## Technology Stack

| Category | Technologies |
|---|---|
| Frontend | Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, GSAP |
| Backend | Node.js, PostgreSQL, Supabase |
| Infrastructure | Vercel, Cloudflare |
| Design | Figma |

- [UI/UX Design in Hyderabad](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/ui-ux-design/in/hyderabad)

## Development Process

1. Discovery (1 week) — Understanding business, goals, competitors, and target audience
2. Design (1-2 weeks) — Wireframes, prototypes, high-fidelity mockups in Figma
3. Development (2-4 weeks) — Building with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS
4. Testing (1 week) — QA across devices, browsers, performance, accessibility (WCAG)
5. Launch (3 days) — Zero-downtime deployment, CDN, SSL, analytics, SEO finalization
6. Support (1 Year Included) — Priority support, updates, monitoring

Typical timeline: 3-8 weeks.

## Pricing

- Starter Website: ₹12,000+ — 1-5 pages, responsive, basic SEO
- Professional Website: ₹25,000+ — Up to 10 pages, custom design, SEO, 1 Year Support, Free Domain
- Business Website: ₹45,000+ — Up to 20 pages, premium design, advanced SEO, CMS
- Premium Website: ₹75,000+ — Unlimited pages, full custom branding, advanced features
- Enterprise Solution: ₹1,00,000+ — Custom scope, full-stack, dedicated support
